case_title: CACH, LLC VS. IRINA SEREBRINA et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-27-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE; UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
